features: Suitable for all Air Wick plug in devices
Delight your senses with Morning Meadow
description: Product Description Enrich your home with the refreshing aroma of Air Wick air freshener electrical plug in refills. Designed for use with all Air Wick plug in devices, this refill releases its scent continuously and can be adjusted according to your needs - keep a low setting for subtle fragrancing or small rooms; or turn up the intensity and fill even the largest of rooms with enticing and elegant aromas. This refill contains natural essential oils and lasts for up to 100 days on a minimum setting. Simply keep the refill upright and insert into the diffuser until you hear a click. Marvel as the atmosphere in your home is transformed into one of luxury. Ingredients 2-T-BUTYLCYCLOHEXYL ACETATE PHENETHYL ALCOHOL, MIXED IONONES, alpha,alpha-Dimethylphenethyl butyrate, Diethyl malonate, CITRONELLOL, TERPINEOL, Isocyclocitral, Nerol, 4-tert-butylcyclohexyl acetate, 2,4-DIMETHYL-3-CYCLO-HEXENE CARBOXALDEHYDE, BENZYL SALICYLATE, Dimethylcyclohex-3-ene-1-carbaldehyde (isomer mixture),CITRAL, LINALOOL, CINNAMYL ALCOHOL, DIPENTENE, GERANIOL, EUGENOL, 2,3-Dihydro-1,1-dimethyl-1H-indene-ar-propanal4-Methyl-3-decen-5-ol, Piperonal.
